title: [CIRCT-VERILOG][ARC] arcilator fails to legalize llhd.process from always_comb with for loop

features.name: always_comb with for loop
features.description: Code should include an always_comb procedural block that contains a for loop construct
features.snippet: always_comb begin out = 4'b0; for (int i = 0; i < 0; i++); end

features.name: zero-iteration for loop in procedural block
features.description: Code should include a for loop with a condition that evaluates to false on first iteration causing zero iterations
